creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: If it's not possible to mix flang and gfortran code the choice of Fortran compiler should be system-wide and controlled by the user, not individual ports.  Users should be able to add fortran=gcc or fortran=flang to DEFAULT_VERSIONS in /etc/make.conf.  USES=fortran should then set the Fortran compiler based on that and support for USES=fortran:gcc can be removed.
